markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, strategy, and platform cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Pipeline Unblocked:** Tanmay will review 41 pending articles (29 old, 12 new) to restart publishing after a two-week pause for the website launch.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**New Hybrid Writing Style:** Erik will create a hybrid style merging Kushal's V2 thought leadership with V1's SEO best practices (tables, bullets) to balance quality and search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Profound Account Cleanup:** Tanmay will audit the cluttered Profound account to remove outdated content, streamline tracking for the "Agent Engine" product, and add topics for zero-visibility prompts.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Traffic Anomaly:** Direct traffic has doubled to \~50% of total traffic, likely due to AI bots/scrapers. GrowthX is investigating to isolate real user data.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Publishing

  - [**Problem:** Publishing paused for two weeks due to the website launch, creating a backlog of 41 articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will review all pending articles after Erik tags them in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [**Thought Leadership:** V2 of the next piece is ready for review; Erik will follow up with Kishal and John.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)

### Writing Style Strategy

  - [**Conflict:** A new "V2" writing style (Kushal's feedback) improves flow but sacrifices SEO features (e.g., comparison tables) present in the "V1" style.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [**Goal:** Create a hybrid style that balances thought leadership quality with SEO performance.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Action:** Erik will use Claude to merge V1 and V2 guidelines; Tanmay will review the result.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Airtable & New Topic Ideas

  - [**Status:** All new topic ideas are merged into Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will identify "zero-visibility" prompts in Profound and add them to the Airtable backlog to ensure coverage for all product features.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)

### Profound Account Cleanup

  - [**Problem:** The Profound account is cluttered with outdated content and poor tracking, hindering visibility and measurement.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Goal:** Clean up the account to focus exclusively on the "Agent Engine" product.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will audit the account and create a cleanup checklist for Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
  - [**Design Partner Role:** Erik requested Tanmay's feedback on missing features, leveraging Tanmay's experience with 25-30 other AI platforms.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Traffic Performance Anomaly

  - [**Observation:** Direct traffic has doubled, now accounting for \~50% of total traffic (400-500 weekly visits vs. 200 without direct).](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The spike is from AI bots/scrapers (e.g., from China/Singapore), evidenced by unusual screen resolutions (800x600).](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Action:** GrowthX is analyzing the data to differentiate real users from bots.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=946.0)

### Agent Use Case Wireframe

  - [**Status:** Tanmay is finalizing a V1 wireframe for the Agent use case.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [**Action:** Tanmay will share the V1 wireframe on Monday for initial feedback from Erik and the internal team.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Tag Tanmay in Notion on the 41 pending articles.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Follow up with Kishal and John on V2 thought leadership review.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
      - [Create and share the hybrid writing style guide with Tanmay.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [**Tanmay:**](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Review all pending articles after being tagged.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
      - [Share the V1 Agent use case wireframe on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
      - [Audit the Profound account and create a cleanup checklist.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=675.0)
      - [Identify and add "zero-visibility" Profound prompts to the Airtable backlog.](https://fathom.video/share/yBZGE3hsGPhAiLvwqehCBmN1Y4KnFvzm?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
